results.rendered_html:
1. sabhāga (sabhā + 1. ga) adj. in die Versammlung —, in den Rath gehend: apyasya rājānaḥ sabhāgā āgacchanti  ŚAT. BR. 3,3,4,14 .  CHĀND. UP. 5,3,6 .
— Vgl. sabhācara.
